title: tanacetum globiferum
intro: Tanacetum globiferum is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant's essential oil, extracted from its flowers, contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating minor wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum globiferum, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Additionally, the plant's oil has been traditionally used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
